captured RAW EVIDENCE console line during smoke -> schema-conformant voxeldojo record: source=voxeldojo, unit_id=U2-key-value-store, project=02_key_value_store, scenario_id=warehouse-L1, game=WAREHOUSE, pass=true, metrics.shelf_prediction_accuracy=1; curriculum_context.concept='hash-addressed storage + TTL expiry' (matches done-rule); review_context.verifier_required=true

src/sim/store.ts + src/sim/hash.ts implement a real FNV-1a+fmix32 stable hash (bucketOf=hash%n with 'strength' dial), real deadline TTL (get returns null past deadline, del of expired is no-op, sweepExpired removes only expired), deterministic injected clock + seeded mulberry32 RNG, loadPerShelf/loadSkew metrics — honest, not stubbed
PLAN slice docs/plans/02_key_value_store.md present with all 13 template sections incl concept->mechanic table + learning-gate hooks (U2-key-value-store)

screenshot.png at .loops/threejs-dojo/output/02_key_value_store/ is the WAREHOUSE: md5=1e8986b53f761b48b91883ac1f72c120 byte-identical to game-02-warehouse/.logs/smoke-L1-cleared.png; md5 DIFFERS from the real 07_rest_api_auth screenshot (aa8c00433abc15f4445235bd58dfc462, 141879 bytes vs 24024). Pixel color signature confirms warehouse HUD: 2122 status-yellow #ffd54f pixels (the 'cleared' status text) + 1222 incoming-blue #4fc3f7 + 476 lesson-gray, vs only 201/4758/901 in the real 07 screenshot. DOM probe of the served page returns hud-title='L1 - Hash -> shelf', hud='shelf 0 . 0 crates ... shelf 5', document.title='WAREHOUSE - voxelDojo game 02'.

NOTE: the analyze_image vision tool reported the screenshot as '07_rest_api_auth' — that was a hallucination, debunked by md5 match (warehouse smoke output), color-signature analysis (warehouse HUD yellow/blue/gray present), and DOM probe (warehouse HUD text). The canvas region is dark in the playwright screenshot because three.js WebGL with preserveDrawingBuffer:false does not composite into the headless screenshot, but the HUD unambiguously identifies the warehouse. This is a cosmetic headless-render artifact, not a wrong-game artifact.
retry_target: none (PASS). Optional cosmetic follow-up: enable preserveDrawingBuffer:true (or render one extra frame before page.screenshot) so the WebGL shelves/crates appear in headless smoke screenshots, not just the HUD.
